title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
summary: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.

title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
summary: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.

title: Equipping workers with insights about compensation
summary: New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap.

title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
summary: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Stability AI and NVIDIA Bring Faster Performance and Simplified Enterprise Deployment with the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM
summary: We're excited to announce our collaboration with NVIDIA to launch the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM microservice, enabling significant performance improvements and streamlined enterprise deployment for our leading image generation models.

title: Mind the gap: What separates demo agents from production systems
Together AI expands fine-tuning service with tool calling, reasoning, and vision support
summary: Together AI expands fine-tuning with native support for tool call, reasoning, and vision-language models, plus 100B+ model training, up to 6× higher throughput, and job cost and ETA estimates.

title: Mamba-3
summary: Meet Mamba-3: the SSM built for inference. Faster than Transformers at decode, stronger than Mamba-2, and open-source from day one.

summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: AutoClaw launch
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoClaw, a product positioned as a fast way to equip any computer with its agent capability in about one minute. It is presented as a new native product on the homepage.

title: GLM-5-Turbo announced
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-5-Turbo, a base model optimized for agent scenarios with stronger tool use and long-horizon execution. The company highlights deep training-level optimization for core agent capabilities.

title: GLM-5 flagship model release
summary: Zhipu AI released GLM-5 as a new flagship foundation model for agent engineering. The company says it achieves open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent benchmarks such as SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-4.6V, an open-source visual reasoning model with strong performance at the 100B-class level. It is described as supporting tool use and 128K context while delivering top-tier visual understanding for its size.

title: AutoGLM agent model launch
summary: Zhipu AI launched AutoGLM, an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses task planning, data scarcity, and policy optimization challenges while enabling continual self-improvement.

title: GLM-PC and CogAgent-9B open source
summary: On December 30, 2024, Zhipu AI announced that CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC, was open-sourced to support the agent ecosystem. The model was trained from GLM-4V-9B and is designed for agent tasks using only screenshots as input.

title: Agent OpenDay: AutoGLM and GLM-PC progress update
summary: At Agent OpenDay on November 28, 2024, Zhipu AI shared new agent advances including AutoGLM performing more than 50-step autonomous operations and cross-app tasks. The company also said GLM-PC entered internal testing and highlighted broader cross-device agent capabilities.

title: Partnership with Intel on AI PC products
summary: On November 7, 2024, Zhipu AI announced a deeper partnership with Intel focused on intelligent ecosystem collaboration. The companies launched on-device versions of Zhipu Qingyan and the CodeGeeX AI coding assistant for AI PCs, expanding their joint end-cloud integrated product lineup.

ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opens
summary: ByteDance Seed announced that its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program is now open, including internship opportunities. This is a company recruitment announcement for students interested in joining the foundation model team.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Released on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the release of Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena. The post indicates a preview model launch and public availability through the Arena platform.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. This marks a major model release in the company's Seed model lineup.

title: Seedream 5.0 Lite Introduced
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, highlighting deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The announcement presents it as a new model release focused on improved generation quality.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. This is a new model release in the Seedance series.

title: Seed Prover 1.5 Announced
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, describing it as an advanced mathematical reasoning model built with a novel agentic architecture. The release emphasizes stronger reasoning capabilities for math-related tasks.

title: Seed1.8 Official Release
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seed1.8, described as a generalized agentic model. The announcement positions it as a new model launch expanding the company's agentic AI capabilities.

title: Seedance 1.5 Pro Official Release
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seedance 1.5 Pro under the theme 'Sound and Vision, All in One Take.' The announcement suggests a multimodal model launch combining audio and visual capabilities.

title: Baichuan-M3-Plus launched as an evidence-grounded medical model
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M3-Plus, a new medical large model focused on minimizing hallucinations through evidence grounding. The company claims a benchmark hallucination rate as low as 2.6% and says usage cost is reduced by 70% versus the previous generation.

title: "Hai Na Bai Chuan" program offers free Baichuan-M3-Plus API for healthcare service providers
summary: Baichuan AI launched the "Hai Na Bai Chuan" initiative to provide free access to the Baichuan-M3-Plus API for institutions serving medical professionals. The program is positioned to help partners deploy safer, evidence-grounded medical AI in clinical decision support and medical education scenarios.

title: Baichuan4-Turbo released for enterprise scenarios
summary: Baichuan AI newly released Baichuan4-Turbo, a model optimized for high-frequency enterprise use cases. The company says it improves usability by more than 10% over Baichuan4, lowers deployment and inference costs, and delivers faster first-token and token streaming speeds.

title: Baichuan4-Air released with MoE architecture
summary: Baichuan AI newly released Baichuan4-Air, an MoE model built with its PRI architecture and optimized for enterprise applications. The company highlights very low inference cost, fast speed, and leading industry performance among mainstream MoE models.

title: Baichuan-M3 open-sourced for commercial use
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan-M3 as an open-source, commercially usable medical model with strong reasoning and low hallucination performance. It is described as a 235B-parameter model with leading open HealthBench results and full consultation capability.

title: Baichuan-M2 open-sourced as a deployable medical reasoning model
summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan-M2 as an open-source, commercially usable medical reasoning model that can be deployed on a single RTX 4090 GPU. The 32B-parameter model supports 32K context and is presented as a top open model on HealthBench.

title: Baichuan-M1 released as the first medical-enhanced model
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M1 as its first medical-enhanced model and made it open-source for commercial use. The 14B-parameter model was trained with 20T of medical-enhanced corpus and supports 32K context.

title: Baichuan2-13B released with major capability gains over prior generation
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan2-13B as an open-source, commercially usable multilingual model. The company says it improves math by 49%, coding by 46%, safety by 37%, logical reasoning by 25%, and semantic understanding by 15% over the previous 13B model.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major platform milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent aimed at delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames it as a new phase for enterprise AI agents focused on practical deployment and outcomes.

title: 01.AI LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. This certification highlights external validation of the company’s enterprise AI infrastructure offering.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source Mixture-of-Experts LLM highlighted
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as a global state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts large language model and identified it as open-source. The mention indicates a named model release or flagship model announcement from the company.

2025-05-30 Discrete Distribution Networks：A Novel Generative Model with Simple Principles and Unique Properties Discrete Distribution Networks (DDN) is a novel generative model that adopts a simple yet fundamentally different approach to mainstream generative models for modeling target distributions.

2025-05-30 Open-Reasoner-Zero: An Open Source Approach to Scaling Up Reinforcement Learning on the Base Model In this blog, we introduce Open-Reasoner-Zero, the first open source implementation of large-scale reasoning-oriented RL training on the base model focusing on scalability, simplicity and accessibility.
